summary: Complete testing of Super Admin Strategic Dashboard for GreenLink Agritech. All 27 backend API tests passed (7 endpoints). Frontend dashboard fully functional with all metrics displaying correctly.

issues: Café and Anacarde show 0 kg volume while displaying surface and yield - data may be filtered incorrectly for these crops

critical_code_review_comments: All admin endpoints properly require authentication (returns 403 for unauthenticated)
Admin role verification works correctly via get_admin_user dependency
Dashboard data is internally consistent (farmer count matches across sections)
All 7 strategic dashboard sections display real data from MongoDB
seed_data_creation: Existing seeded data used: 150 farmers, 8 cooperatives, 250 parcels, 300 harvests, 85 carbon credits
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Strategic Dashboard fully tested. Backend endpoints: /dashboard, /report/production, /report/carbon, /report/social-impact, /report/trade, /report/eudr-compliance, /regions, /export/csv. All require admin auth. Frontend tabs: Overview, Production, Carbone & EUDR, Impact Social, Marché & Commerce. Period filter (month/quarter/year/all) works correctly.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/dashboard: PASS - Returns all 7 strategic sections with real data
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/report/producti: PASS - Returns production report with monthly trends
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/report/carbon: PASS - Returns carbon capture and SDG alignment data
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/report/social-i: PASS - Returns beneficiaries, gender, youth, financial data
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/report/trade: PASS - Returns trade volumes and export markets
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/report/eudr-com: PASS - Returns compliance status and certifications
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/export/csv: PASS - Returns export URLs for all report types

frontend_dashboard.page_load: PASS - Dashboard loads at /admin/analytics with dark theme
frontend_dashboard.metric_cards: PASS - 6 key metrics displayed (Farmers, Hectares, CO2, Credits, EUDR%, Market)
frontend_dashboard.production_section: PASS - Shows crop volumes (Cacao 123.8T, Café Robusta 149.9T, Café Arabica 115.9T)
frontend_dashboard.eudr_section: PASS - Compliance: 92%, Geolocation: 88.4%, Alerts: 0, Export Ready: 88.5%
frontend_dashboard.tabs_navigation: PASS - All 5 tabs work (Overview, Production, Carbone & EUDR, Impact Social, Marché)
frontend_dashboard.target_badges: PASS - Shows Banque Mondiale, FMI, OMC, ONG, Bourse Café-Cacao, Acheteurs badges
frontend_dashboard.admin_link: PASS - Button in /admin page navigates to /admin/analytics
